name: csv-compare
description: A Bun CLI for comparing CSV files by ID or another key field.

scripts.profile: bun run src/index.ts examples/source.csv --out examples/profile-report.md --format markdown
scripts.sample: bun run src/index.ts examples/source.csv examples/source.csv --key ID --out examples/report.md --format markdown
scripts.sample:diff: bun run src/index.ts examples/source.csv examples/target.csv --key ID --out examples/diff-report.md --format markdown
scripts.sample:unknown: bun run src/index.ts examples/unknown-source.csv examples/unknown-target.csv --key "External Ref" --out examples/unknown-report.md --format markdown
scripts.sample:html: bun run src/index.ts examples/source.csv examples/target.csv --key ID --out examples/report.html --format html
